name: 弯刀（★） | 渐变之色
descriptionEn: A modern homage to a falchion sword, this clip point blade has a curved edge. It has been painted by airbrushing transparent paints that fade together over a chrome base coat. This isn't just a weapon, it's a conversation piece - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptionZh: 一把向弯剑致以现代敬意的匕首，它的刀刃是弯曲的。 这把武器以铬为外表，使用喷笔涂上了相互渐变的透明涂装。 这不仅仅是一把武器，更是一种潮流 - 实习军火商伊莫金
